Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

StreamLight 0.2.0

1.0.0 (3/13/2026)

  • Update to version 1.0.0. I think it is time to finally have the versioning reflect that this package is no longer in development status. To go along with that I have updated and revised the tutorials and gone through things to make sure everything is functioning.

0.2.0 (5/18/2021)

  • Update to version 0.2.0 includes a massive update to include the new aqua_light function which generates estimates of photosynthetically active radiation at the benthic surface! The details and application of aqua_light are detailed in Savoy & Harvey. (2021a), and the modeled estimates from this paper are available in a ScienceBase data release (Savoy & Harvey, 2021b).

On this page

Developed by Phil Savoy.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
